description: An editor needs to review a long-form feature story for grammar, style, clarity, and adherence to the publication's style guide.

nodes.task_description: Read through the entire article to get a sense of the narrative and structure.

expected_outcome.value: Editor understands the story's main points and flow.

nodes.task_description: Perform a line-by-line edit, correcting all grammatical errors, typos, and punctuation mistakes.

expected_outcome.value: The document is free of basic errors.

nodes.task_description: Check the article against the publication's internal style guide (e.g., AP Style) and correct any inconsistencies.

expected_outcome.value: The article conforms to all house style rules.
